title: oxyanthus lepidus var. unyorensis
intro: Oxyanthus lepidus var. unyorensis, also known as Unyore oxyanthus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to East Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Oxyanthus lepidus var. unyorensis is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
